_comment: H1 Robot to HOYO Skeleton Mapping
_description: Maps H1 body links to HOYO 14-joint skeleton format
_note_offsets_mode: When using h1_minimal.usd (no marker Xforms), map to torso/elbow and use offsets in h1_to_hoyo_offsets.json.
head: torso_link
_offsets_note: Offsets are applied in style_module.py when mapping to torso/elbow or if joints are missing.
_fallback_note: If you switch to marker USD, update mapping to head/neck/hand_tip or use marker override in debug scripts.
